screen.name: overview
screen.title: Use the magnifying glass to search the body. There are three points of interest.
There are two more points of interest.
There is one more point of interest.

screen.name: head1
screen.title: Contact wound markings
screen.text: Contact wounds typically have seared and blackened margins from the flame and gunpowder that accompany the bullet. Some even have a muzzle imprint around them. Others might have a stellar shape.
screen.text2: If the bullet is shot from a longer distance, the resulting wound doesn’t have any of those markings.
screen.caption: Seared abrasions and blackening
Muzzle imprint
Stellate split-opening

screen.name: head2
screen.text: Does this wound show any of the following markings?
screen.response: The margin of our wound looks pretty clean to me. Try again.
I don’t see a muzzle imprint. Try again.
No – this wound is round, not stellate-shaped. Try again.
Yes, I don’t see any markings that would suggest a contact wound either.

screen.name: head3
screen.title: Intermediate range (1 cm to 4 m) gunshot wound
screen.text: If the muzzle of the gun is held at least one centimeter away from the body, but closer than four meters, the powder grains emerging together with the bullet strike the skin. The grains cause small abrasions on the skin, which is called powder tattooing.
screen.caption: Powder tattooing

screen.name: head4
screen.text: Do you see any powder tattooing around the wound?
screen.option: No, there is no powder tattooing.

screen.name: hand1
screen.text: First, moisten the swab bulb with 1 drop of water.
screen.caption: Sterile Water

screen.name: hand2
screen.text: Next, thoroughly swab underneath all five fingernails to collect a sample from the right hand.

screen.name: hand3
screen.text: Good. Now place the swab in the container.
screen.caption: Fingernail swab right hand

screen.name: hand4
screen.text: You’ll have to swab the left hand, too. Again, moisten the swab with a drop of sterile water.
screen.caption: Sterile Water

screen.name: hand5
screen.text: Next, thoroughly swab underneath all five fingernails to collect a sample from the left hand.

screen.name: hand6
screen.text: Good. Now place the swab in the container.
screen.caption: Fingernail swab left hand

screen.name: fingerprint1
screen.text: To collect the victim’s fingerprint, pick up a sheet of lift tape and place it on the victim’s thumb.

screen.name: fingerprint2
screen.text: Good. Now place the print in the evidence container.
screen.caption: Evidence
